title: UHC Panorama
description: Spice up the default panorama with exciting new ultra hardcore scenery!
body:
# Description
This pack portrays a scenic chaos of the top **UHC** PVPers and personalities battling it out in the iconic **PvPClub** Arena!

Some notable figures include:
- Swight
- DangerMario
- **Ducco (HT1)**

Just to highlight a few!
## Mods used!
[WorldTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldtools) Mod responsible for downloading world data from servers, IE: The arena featured in the display.

[Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) Player positioning and modeling.

[Panorama Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/mod/panorama-screenshot) Saved loads of time and effort in regards to actually recording the panorama.

### Credits!
Everything was made possible by my friend **Gingerandcoco**, which did all the boring stuff. I would also like to thank the **UHC** community, mainly those featured in this project, and of course the **PvPClub** staff!
